name: Orange Cinnamon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a large skillet, and brown chicken.
2. Remove chicken to cooker as it browns.
3. Combine all other ingredients, except flour, in the skillet.
4. Mix well and pour over chicken.
5. Cover pot and cook on LOW for 4-6 hours, or until chicken is tender.
6. Remove one cup of sauce from the pot and combine with flour, mixing well.
7. Return sauce flour mixture to the pot.
8. Turn heat to HIGH and cook an additional half hour.
